members.label: lamp
members.description: table lamp on small side table near couch
members.long_form_open_description: A small table lamp with a light-colored shade sits on a side table next to the near end of the couch. Provides soft localized lighting and is accompanied by small decorative items and possibly a plant.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: On a small table between the couch and the hallway opening; near a potted plant
